description_long: This is a single-story bungalow set within a fenced yard, surrounded by numerous mature trees and lush landscaping. The main structure features a hip roof with a reddish-brown hue, complemented by several attached sections, including a glass-roofed sunroom or greenhouse and a flat-roofed extension. The property includes a kidney-shaped swimming pool, a wooden deck, and a small patio area, all integrated into the green lawn. The perimeter is enclosed by a white picket fence, with a main entrance gate and a secondary side gate. Windows are distributed asymmetrically, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, and the front entrance is marked by a small porch. The overall style is modern with functional outdoor amenities and a focus on blending indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a hip roof, glass sunroom, and lush yard featuring a pool and deck, all enclosed by a white picket fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, glass sunroom, wooden deck, and dense tree coverage.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the hip roof, backyard trees, and the back section of the fence.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the swimming pool, trampoline, and the glass-roofed sunroom extension.
description_view_3: Opposite front view with a clear look at the main gate, patio, and the arrangement of outdoor amenities.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
